issues.title: Qdrant vector source unsupport null value in metadata
issues.body:
**Bug description**
NullPointerException when null value in metadata.
`toObjectMap`use `Collectors.toMap` to create map, but it unsupport null value. Qdrant allow null value in metadata.
[it may help this](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/24630963/nullpointerexception-in-collectors-tomap-with-null-entry-values)

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/094eeab405ff9518ea9722226f18faeef33c7f3f/vector-stores/spring-ai-qdrant-store/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/vectorstore/qdrant/QdrantVectorStore.java#L280

https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/094eeab405ff9518ea9722226f18faeef33c7f3f/vector-stores/spring-ai-qdrant-store/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/vectorstore/qdrant/QdrantObjectFactory.java#L44

**Environment**
Spring AI 1.0.0

issues.title: ResponseErrorHandler used in `RetryUtils` fails with Spring Framework 7.x
Question about vllm LLM models
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, there might be already a duplicate issue for the one you are about to create.
If the bug is trivial, just go ahead and create the issue. Otherwise, please take a few moments and fill in the following sections:

**Bug description**
```java
    public String test(String text) {

        return chatClient.prompt()
                .user(text)
                .call()
                .content();
    }


    public ChatModel NvidiaOpenAIModel() {

        OpenAiApi openAiApi = OpenAiApi.builder()
                .apiKey("")
                .baseUrl("http://192.168.10.224:8080") // vllm baseurl
                .build();

        OpenAiChatOptions options = OpenAiChatOptions.builder()
                .model("Qwen/Qwen3-14B-FP8")
                .temperature(0.7)
                .maxTokens(1000)
                .build();

        return OpenAiChatModel.builder()
                .openAiApi(openAiApi)
                .defaultOptions(options)
                .build();
    }

the code can call nvidia llm only when i cover with apikey and baseurl  of nvidia platform 
but i will get 400 with the response of "{"object":"error","message":"[{'type': 'missing', 'loc': ('body',), 'msg': 'Field required', 'input': None}]","type":"Bad Request","param":null,"code":400} " when i change baseurl and model name to localhost vllm 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e036d314-a0b2-43c8-ae37-62e1fb17fd65)

i can successfully call the vllm model with python and langgraph in the same way
```

**Environment**
jdk 17 
Spring AI 1.0 
vllm 0.9.0 
**Steps to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the issue.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
Please provide a failing test or a minimal complete verifiable example that reproduces the issue.
Bug reports that are reproducible will take priority in resolution over reports that are not reproducible.
